usagePolicy: Generic product artwork only. No private campaign content or user data was used in prompts.

assets.intendedUse: Public entry hero background with UI text overlaid separately.
assets.prompt: Overhead premium editorial illustration of a refined TRPG GM desk at night, with campaign map, pinned clue threads, handwritten notes, dice, lantern glow, and luminous route lines converging messy log fragments into an organized next-session path; wide composition with dark negative space for UI copy; no text, letters, logos, watermark, faces, screens, or app UI.

assets.alt: 調査モードを表す、海辺の地図と手がかりの糸を重ねたコンパスレンズのエンブレム。
assets.intendedUse: First-run campaign mode card for investigation campaigns.
assets.prompt: Square premium emblem for Investigation campaign mode: compass lens, clue thread pins, coastal night map lines, subtle magnifying-glass geometry; polished editorial icon illustration; no text, words, logos, watermark, faces, weapons, or generic fantasy parchment.

assets.alt: ファンタジーモードを表す、ランタンと旅路の星図が載ったキャンペーン年代記のエンブレム。
assets.intendedUse: First-run campaign mode card for fantasy campaigns.
assets.prompt: Square premium emblem for Fantasy campaign mode: lantern-lit route sigil over a campaign chronicle, dice, folded realm map, and constellation route lines; polished editorial icon illustration; no text, words, logos, watermark, characters, faces, or weapon focal point.

assets.alt: カスタムモードを表す、空白の星図と未記入カードが並ぶ柔軟なキャンペーン設計エンブレム。
assets.intendedUse: First-run campaign mode card for custom campaigns.
assets.prompt: Square premium emblem for Custom campaign mode: blank constellation map, route nodes, archival ring, index cards, and a glowing unnamed path; polished editorial icon illustration; no text, words, logos, watermark, faces, characters, or genre-specific magic symbols.
